examples.question: What is the capital of the country where the Eiffel Tower is located?

title: Eiffel Tower
France
sentences: The Eiffel Tower is a landmark in Paris, France.
France is a country in Western Europe.

examples.question: Which author wrote both "1984" and "Animal Farm"?

title: 1984 (novel)
Animal Farm
sentences: Nineteen Eighty-Four is a dystopian novel by English writer George Orwell.
Animal Farm is an allegorical novella by George Orwell, first published in 1945.
